Off Calendar Mar-19-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514, Judge: John Dearman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Joan Martin, CSR#6036 Telephone # (415) 398 1889.

Kelly a. Woodruff, Esq., appearing for Respondents Richard J. Casey and Gloria J. Casey.
Michael P. Guta, Esq., appearing for Petitioner Casey Securities LLC.

Respondents Richard J. Casey and Gloria J. Casey's Objection to Orders of Examination and Civil Subpoenas Duces Tecum against third parties; Request for recovery of related Attorneys' fees and expenses against Petitioner is heard this day.
After argument of respective counsel the court ordered the examination of Gloria J. Casey and Richard J. Casey off calendar. Court ordered Petitioner to apply for a new Order of Examination for Gloria J. Casey or Richard J. Casey and serve OEX accordingly.
Court denied Respondents' request for Attorneys' Fees and Expenses.

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jan-22-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Michael Guta, Esq. of Casey Securities, Tel. 415.852.6493, for petitioner and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. PETITIONER CASEY SECURITIES LLC's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is Granted. No opposition filed. Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
